scenes.npcDialog: Good morning! May I see your passport and booking confirmation?
Do you have a seat preference? Window or aisle?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 좌석 선호가 있으신가요? 창가 아니면 통로?

choices.text: I want to sit on the wing.

scenes.npcDialog: How many bags are you checking in today?

choices.text: I want to check in myself.

scenes.npcDialog: Please place your laptop and liquids in a separate tray.
Please step aside. Do you have anything metal in your pockets?

choices.text: Oh, I forgot my belt. Let me remove it.
I might have some coins. Here they are.

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you find something?

choices.text: I'm looking for my gate. It's gate 25.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to see anything in particular?
We're now boarding rows 20 to 35. May I see your boarding pass?
Can I help you find your seat?
Let me help you with your bag. Is this your carry-on?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 가방 넣는 것 도와드릴게요. 이게 기내용 가방인가요?

scenes.npcDialog: What would you like to drink? We have juice, water, coffee, and tea.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 음료는 뭘로 드릴까요? 주스, 물, 커피, 차가 있습니다.

scenes.npcDialog: For your meal, would you like beef or chicken?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 식사로 소고기와 닭고기 중 뭘로 드릴까요?

scenes.npcDialog: Is there anything else I can get for you?

choices.text: Could I get a blanket, please?
I want to sleep in first class.

scenes.npcDialog: Excuse me, the seatbelt sign is on. Could you wait a moment?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 죄송합니다, 안전벨트 사인이 켜져있어요. 잠시 기다려주시겠어요?

choices.text: Okay, I'll go back to my seat.
I don't care about the sign.

scenes.npcDialog: Do you need help filling out the arrival card?

choices.text: Yes, what should I write for 'purpose of visit'?
Where do I write my hotel address?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like headphones for the entertainment system?

choices.text: That would be great, thank you.

scenes.npcDialog: Please return to your seat and fasten your seatbelt. We're experiencing turbulence.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 좌석으로 돌아가 안전벨트를 매주세요. 난기류가 있습니다.

choices.text: Okay, I'll sit down right away.
Is it going to be a rough ride?

scenes.npcDialog: We'll be landing in 30 minutes. Please put your tray table up and seat in the upright position.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 30분 후 착륙합니다. 테이블을 접고 좌석을 바로 세워주세요.

choices.text: Okay, thank you for letting me know.

scenes.npcDialog: What is the purpose of your visit?
How long will you be staying?

choices.text: I'll be here for two weeks.

scenes.npcDialog: Where will you be staying?

choices.text: I'm staying at the Hilton Hotel.
At a hotel in the city center.

scenes.npcDialog: Do you have a return ticket?

choices.text: Yes, I'm flying back on the 15th.

scenes.npcDialog: Which carousel is your luggage on?

choices.text: I'm not sure. My flight was from Seoul.

scenes.npcDialog: Is there a problem with your luggage?

choices.text: Yes, my bag hasn't come out yet.
I can't find my suitcase. It's a black one.

scenes.npcDialog: How much would you like to exchange?

choices.text: Can I exchange 300 dollars to euros?

scenes.npcDialog: Today's rate is 1.08 euros per dollar. Is that okay?
How can I help you today?

choices.text: How do I get to the city center?
What's the best way to get downtown?

scenes.npcDialog: Where would you like to go?

choices.text: One ticket to Central Station, please.
How much is a ticket to the city center?

scenes.npcDialog: Good evening! Do you have a reservation?

choices.text: Yes, I have a reservation under Kim.
Yes, I booked online. Here's my confirmation.
No, but give me the best room.

scenes.npcDialog: Your room includes breakfast. It's served from 7 to 10 AM.

choices.text: Great, where is the breakfast room?
Perfect, thank you for the information.

scenes.npcDialog: Is there anything else you need?

choices.text: Could you tell me the WiFi password?

scenes.npcDialog: Brilliant spot for photos! Big Ben chimes every hour. Would you like me to take your picture with it?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 사진 찍기 좋은 곳이에요! 빅벤은 매시간 울려요. 사진 찍어드릴까요?

choices.text: Yes, please! That would be lovely.
Thanks! Can you get the whole tower in the frame?

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome to Borough Market! Would you like to try our aged cheddar? We've got cheeses from all over Britain. Free samples!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 보로 마켓에 오신 걸 환영해요! 숙성 체다 치즈 드셔보실래요? 영국 전역 치즈가 있어요. 시식 무료예요!

choices.text: I'd love to try! What's your most popular cheese?
Yes please! Can I also try that one?
Free samples are never good quality.

scenes.npcDialog: Our river cruise passes all the landmarks - Big Ben, Tower Bridge, the Shard. Commentary included! Which language do you prefer?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 리버 크루즈는 모든 명소를 지나가요 - 빅벤, 타워 브릿지, 샤드. 해설 포함이에요! 어떤 언어가 좋으세요?

choices.text: English is fine. How long is the full cruise?
Do you have Korean audio guides?

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome! Your family room is ready. It has two queen beds.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 환영합니다! 패밀리룸 준비됐어요. 퀸 베드 2개 있어요.

choices.text: Perfect! Is there a crib available?
Great! Where's the children's play area?

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome to the park! Your child must be this tall for some rides.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 공원에 오신 것을 환영해요! 일부 놀이기구는 키 제한이 있어요.

choices.text: Which rides are safe for toddlers?
Are there any height restrictions we should know about?

scenes.npcDialog: The playground is just ahead.

choices.text: Great! Is it suitable for a 3-year-old?
Are there any swings and slides?

scenes.npcDialog: Good evening! Your room is ready. Would you like an upgrade to a suite for 50 euros more?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 안녕하세요! 객실 준비되었습니다. 50유로 추가하시면 스위트룸으로 업그레이드 가능한데요?

choices.text: That sounds nice. What does the suite include?
What's the difference between the rooms?
Give me the upgrade for free.

scenes.npcDialog: The regular line is about 2 hours. Would you like skip-the-line tickets?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 일반 줄은 약 2시간 기다려야 해요. 줄 안서는 티켓 원하세요?

choices.text: Yes, how much extra is it?
Definitely, I don't want to wait.
I should get VIP for free.

scenes.npcDialog: The Changing of the Guard starts at 11. You'll want to arrive early for a good spot. It's quite spectacular!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 근위병 교대식은 11시에 시작해요. 좋은 자리 잡으려면 일찍 오세요. 정말 멋져요!

choices.text: What time should I arrive to get a front spot?
Is photography allowed during the ceremony?
I don't want to wait that long.
The guards look silly in those hats.

scenes.npcDialog: The Tower Bridge Exhibition includes the glass floor walkway. You can see the river 42 meters below! Bit scary but amazing views!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 타워 브릿지 전시관에는 유리 바닥 통로가 있어요. 42미터 아래 강이 보여요! 좀 무섭지만 경치 끝내줘요!

choices.text: That sounds exciting! Is the glass floor safe?
I can't miss that! What time does it close?

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome to Brick Lane Curry House! We're famous for our tikka masala. Mild, medium, or spicy? We also have vegetarian options.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 브릭레인 카레 하우스에 오신 걸 환영해요! 티카 마살라가 유명해요. 순한 맛, 중간, 매운 맛? 채식 옵션도 있어요.

choices.text: I'll try medium spicy. What's your specialty?
Tikka masala sounds great! With naan bread please.
Indian food is too spicy for me.
Why would I eat Indian food in London?

scenes.npcDialog: Do you need anything else for your room?

choices.text: Yes, we need a crib for our baby.
Can you bring a baby bed and a bed rail?
The baby will sleep on the floor.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to leave your kids at our play center?

choices.text: How does it work? Is there supervision?
Is it safe? How long can they stay?
They can take care of themselves.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like a family photo?

choices.text: Yes please! Can you get all of us in the frame?
That would be great! Say 'cheese', kids!
Photos are a waste of time.

scenes.npcDialog: How may I assist you this evening?

choices.text: Could you recommend a nice restaurant nearby?
Can you make a reservation for me?
You should know what I want.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to book a spa treatment?

choices.text: Yes, what massage options do you have?
I'd like a 60-minute deep tissue massage.
Spas are a waste of money.

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome to the pub! Our fish and chips is legendary. Fancy a pint of ale with that? We've got proper British ales on tap.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 펍에 오신 걸 환영해요! 피쉬앤칩스는 저희 자랑이에요. 에일 맥주 한 잔 하실래요? 정통 영국 에일 있어요.

choices.text: Fish and chips sounds perfect! I'll try the local ale too.
What ale would you recommend for a first-timer?
Fish and chips is too greasy.

scenes.npcDialog: The London Eye rotation takes 30 minutes. At sunset, the views are magical! Would you like a fast-track ticket?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 런던 아이는 한 바퀴 도는 데 30분 걸려요. 일몰 때 경치가 환상적이에요! 패스트트랙 티켓 원하세요?

choices.text: Yes, I'd like the sunset time slot please.
How long is the regular queue?
I can see views from anywhere.

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome to 221B Baker Street! You can sit in Holmes' chair and wear the famous deerstalker hat. Photos are encouraged!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 221B 베이커 스트리트에 오신 걸 환영해요! 홈즈 의자에 앉고 유명한 사슴사냥꾼 모자를 쓸 수 있어요. 사진 찍으세요!

choices.text: I'm a huge Sherlock fan! Where's the famous chair?
Can I try on the deerstalker hat?

scenes.npcDialog: Will the little one be eating too?

choices.text: Yes, do you have any baby food options?
Can you blend something soft for the baby?

scenes.npcDialog: Is everything okay? You look worried.

choices.text: I can't find my child! Can you help me?
My daughter is missing! Where's the lost child center?
Kids get lost all the time.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like anything else?

choices.text: Can we get the kids' meal to go? They're tired.
Could you pack this up for later?

scenes.npcDialog: Room service, how may I help you?

choices.text: I'd like to order breakfast for tomorrow morning.
Could I get a bottle of wine sent up?
Bring me everything on the menu.

scenes.npcDialog: Are you visiting from abroad? You may be eligible for tax refund.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 해외에서 오셨나요? 택스 리펀 받으실 수 있어요.

choices.text: Yes, how do I get the tax refund?
Can you prepare the documents for me?
Just give me the discount now.

scenes.npcDialog: The Rosetta Stone is straight ahead. Free entry, but donations are appreciated. Would you like a museum map?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 로제타 스톤은 바로 앞에 있어요. 무료 입장이지만 기부 환영해요. 박물관 지도 드릴까요?

choices.text: Yes, I'd love a map. Where are the Egyptian mummies?
The Rosetta Stone! I've always wanted to see it.
Why should I donate if it's free?

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome to afternoon tea! We serve finger sandwiches, scones with clotted cream, and a selection of fine teas. Earl Grey or English Breakfast?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 애프터눈 티에 오신 걸 환영해요! 핑거 샌드위치, 클로티드 크림 스콘, 다양한 차가 있어요. 얼그레이? 잉글리시 브렉퍼스트?

choices.text: Earl Grey, please. This looks so elegant!
What's the proper way to eat a scone?
Tea is just hot water with leaves.

scenes.npcDialog: Lovely day for the park! You can rent a deck chair by the Serpentine. The Diana Memorial Fountain is beautiful this time of year.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 공원 오기 좋은 날이에요! 서펜타인 호수 옆에서 데크 체어 빌릴 수 있어요. 다이애나 분수가 이맘때 아름다워요.

choices.text: A deck chair sounds relaxing! How much is it?
I'd love to see the Diana Fountain. Which way?
I didn't come to London to sit in a park.

scenes.npcDialog: We have a special kids menu. Would you like one?

choices.text: Yes please! Does it come with a toy?
What options are there? My child is picky.
Just give them the adult portion.

scenes.npcDialog: Is there anything wrong?

choices.text: My child has a fever. Is there a doctor nearby?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to stop for a break?

choices.text: Yes, the kids need a bathroom break.
Let's stop here. They need to stretch their legs.
We'll stop when we get there.

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome to business class check-in. May I see your passport?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 비즈니스 클래스 체크인에 오신 것을 환영합니다. 여권 보여주시겠어요?

choices.text: Here you go. Is the lounge open now?

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome to the lounge. May I see your boarding pass?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 라운지에 오신 것을 환영합니다. 탑승권 보여주시겠어요?

choices.text: Here you go. Where are the showers?
Is there a quiet area to work?

scenes.npcDialog: Need an Oyster card? It's £5 for the card plus credit. Much cheaper than paper tickets. Mind the gap!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 오이스터 카드 필요하세요? 카드비 5파운드에 충전금 추가요. 종이 티켓보다 훨씬 저렴해요. 발 밑 조심하세요!

choices.text: I'll take one with £20 credit, please.
Can I use contactless payment instead?
Why do I need to pay for the card?

scenes.npcDialog: Looking for something unique? We've got vintage clothes, handmade jewelry, and street food from everywhere! Cash is best here.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 특별한 거 찾으세요? 빈티지 옷, 수제 주얼리, 세계 각국 길거리 음식이 있어요! 현금이 편해요.

choices.text: I love vintage! Where are the best clothing stalls?
Can you recommend some good street food?
Markets are too crowded for me.

scenes.npcDialog: Liberty London is famous for our prints and fabrics. The building itself is Tudor revival - like stepping back in time! Our scarf collection is exquisite.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 리버티 런던은 프린트와 원단으로 유명해요. 건물 자체가 튜더 양식이라 과거로 간 것 같죠! 스카프 컬렉션이 기막혀요.

choices.text: The building is gorgeous! Can I see the famous prints?
I'd love to see the scarves. Where are they?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to rent a stroller?

choices.text: Yes please! How much per day?
That would be great. Where do I return it?

scenes.npcDialog: How can I help you today?

choices.text: What do you have for a child's stomach ache?

scenes.npcDialog: Good evening. Do you have a reservation?

choices.text: Yes, reservation for Kim at 7 PM.
I booked a table for two.

scenes.npcDialog: Here's your rental car. Would you like additional insurance coverage?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 렌터카 여기 있습니다. 추가 보험 들으시겠어요?

choices.text: What does the full coverage include?
Yes, I'd like the comprehensive insurance.

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome to Harrods! Looking for anything special? Our Food Halls are famous worldwide. The Egyptian Room is stunning too.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 해롯에 오신 걸 환영해요! 특별히 찾으시는 거 있으세요? 푸드홀이 세계적으로 유명해요. 이집트 룸도 멋져요.

choices.text: I'd love to see the Food Halls! Where are they?
Do you have any British souvenirs?
I'm just looking, leave me alone.

scenes.npcDialog: The Crown Jewels are in the Jewel House. Look for the famous Koh-i-Noor diamond! Yeoman Warder tours are excellent too.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 왕관 보석은 보석관에 있어요. 유명한 코이누르 다이아몬드를 찾아보세요! 요먼 워더 투어도 훌륭해요.

choices.text: When is the next Yeoman Warder tour?
I can't wait to see the Crown Jewels!

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to try a Victoria sponge? It's the Queen's favorite! We also have sticky toffee pudding if you want something warm.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 빅토리아 스펀지 케이크 드셔보실래요? 여왕님이 좋아하시던 거예요! 따뜻한 게 좋으시면 스티키 토피 푸딩도 있어요.

choices.text: Victoria sponge please! It looks delicious.

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you find something?

choices.text: Where's the nearest baby changing room?
Is there a diaper changing station nearby?

scenes.npcDialog: What brings you in today?

choices.text: My son has had a fever since yesterday.
She's been vomiting. Is it food poisoning?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to try our tasting menu with wine pairing?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 와인 페어링과 함께하는 테이스팅 메뉴 드셔보시겠어요?

choices.text: That sounds wonderful. What wines are included?
Yes, please. Is there a vegetarian option?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like valet parking for your vehicle?

choices.text: Yes, please. How much is it per day?
Valet parking is for lazy people.

scenes.npcDialog: Looking for West End tickets? Les Misérables and Phantom are classics. We also have same-day rush tickets for £30!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 웨스트엔드 티켓 찾으세요? 레미제라블과 오페라의 유령이 클래식이에요. 당일 러시 티켓은 30파운드예요!

choices.text: I'd love to see Phantom! Are there any good seats left?
What shows would you recommend for a first-timer?
£30 is still too expensive for a show.
I don't understand English musicals anyway.

scenes.situation: 파스텔 색 집들과 포토벨로 마켓을 방문한다
scenes.npcDialog: The colorful houses are on Lancaster Road! Portobello Market is best on Saturdays. Have you seen the movie Notting Hill?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 알록달록한 집들은 랭커스터 로드에 있어요! 포토벨로 마켓은 토요일이 제일 좋아요. 노팅힐 영화 보셨어요?

choices.text: Yes, I love that movie! Where was the bookshop?
Which street has the best Instagram spots?

scenes.npcDialog: How many tickets would you like?

choices.text: Two adults and one child. Is there a kids' discount?
Do children under 5 get in free?
I won't pay for my kids.

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you find something?

choices.text: Is there a private area for breastfeeding?

scenes.npcDialog: Shall I call a taxi for you, or would you prefer to use the app?

choices.text: Please call a taxi. I'm going to the opera house.
I'll use the app. What's the address here?
I'll walk... no, actually drive me.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like us to deliver your luggage directly to your hotel?

choices.text: That would be great! How long does it take?
Yes, what time will it arrive?
Why would I pay for that?

scenes.npcDialog: We have a family pass that saves you money.

choices.text: That sounds great! How many people does it cover?
How much is the family pass?

scenes.npcDialog: What kind of places are you looking for?

choices.text: What attractions are safe for young children?
Where can we go that's kid-friendly?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like a private guide for your city tour?

choices.text: Yes, can the guide speak Korean?
How much is a private half-day tour?

scenes.npcDialog: Front desk, how may I help you?

choices.text: The air conditioning in my room isn't working.
I can't figure out how to adjust the temperature.

scenes.npcDialog: Housekeeping, can I help you?

choices.text: Could I get some extra towels, please?
I need more towels for my room.

scenes.npcDialog: Good morning! How can I assist you today?

choices.text: Could I get a late checkout?

scenes.npcDialog: Are you checking out today?

choices.text: Yes, I'd like to check out.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like us to store your luggage?

choices.text: Yes, I'll pick it up around 3 PM.
That would be great. My flight is this evening.

scenes.npcDialog: Good evening! Table for how many?
Are you ready to order?

choices.text: Yes, I'll have the pasta, please.
Could I have a few more minutes?

scenes.npcDialog: What would you like to drink?

choices.text: I'll have a glass of water, please.
Could I see the wine list?

scenes.npcDialog: Do you have any food allergies?
Can I get you anything else?
How would you like to pay?

choices.text: Can I pay with credit card?

scenes.npcDialog: Where to?

choices.text: Can you take me to this address?

scenes.npcDialog: That'll be 25 euros.

choices.text: Here you go. Keep the change.

scenes.npcDialog: How can I help you?

choices.text: One ticket to Central Station, please.
How much is a day pass?
I want to ride for free.

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you with directions?

choices.text: Does this bus go to the museum?
Which bus goes to the city center?

scenes.npcDialog: Excuse me, are you lost?

choices.text: Yes, I'm looking for the train station.
Could you tell me how to get to the museum?

scenes.npcDialog: Good morning! Where are you flying to today?

choices.text: I don't want to go home.

scenes.npcDialog: Last minute shopping? Can I help you find something?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 마지막 쇼핑하세요? 뭔가 찾는 거 도와드릴까요?

choices.text: I'm looking for some chocolate as a gift.
Do you have any local souvenirs?

scenes.npcDialog: Do you need a customs declaration form?

choices.text: Yes, please. What do I need to declare?
Do I need to declare gifts I bought?
